prompt_text:
### Demographics: 36-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 3 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs; Occasional GI side effects (nausea/loose stool)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class II)
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Major Depressive Disorder
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 5 years ago; 20 cigarettes/day for 15 years; ~15 pack-years); Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Insulin Degludec 15units once daily; Duloxetine (60 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 92.5 kg; Height 167.2 cm; BMI 33.1 kg/m²; Blood pressure 132/78 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.8%; 9 months ago 8.1%; 6 months ago 7.6%; 3 months ago 7.2%; current 9.5%), FPG (12 months ago 199mg/dL; 9 months ago 197mg/dL; 6 months ago 154mg/dL; 3 months ago 180mg/dL; current 203mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 95.1kg; 9 months ago 93.1kg; 6 months ago 92.9kg; 3 months ago 91.2kg; current 92.5kg), Height (12 months ago 167.2cm; 9 months ago 167.2cm; 6 months ago 167.2cm; 3 months ago 167.2cm; current 167.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 32.0kg/m²; current 33.1kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 134mmHg; 9 months ago 133mmHg; 6 months ago 137mmHg; 3 months ago 135mmHg; current 132mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 78mmHg; 9 months ago 80mmHg; 6 months ago 79mmHg; 3 months ago 80mmHg; current 78mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 18U/L; 9 months ago 17U/L; 6 months ago 8.0U/L; 3 months ago 9.0U/L; current 13U/L), AST (12 months ago 7U/L; 9 months ago 14U/L; 6 months ago 13U/L; 3 months ago 6.1U/L; current 10U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.5mg/dL; current 0.5mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 50mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 54mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 50mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 49mL/min/1.73m²; current 49mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 77mg/g; 9 months ago 56mg/g; 6 months ago 52mg/g; 3 months ago 53mg/g; current 91mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 79mg/dL; 9 months ago 73mg/dL; 6 months ago 74mg/dL; 3 months ago 73mg/dL; current 77mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 36mg/dL; 9 months ago 35mg/dL; 6 months ago 39mg/dL; 3 months ago 36mg/dL; current 37mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 114mg/dL; 9 months ago 100mg/dL; 6 months ago 118mg/dL; 3 months ago 113mg/dL; current 108mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 14.3g/dL; 9 months ago 14.3g/dL; 6 months ago 14.2g/dL; 3 months ago 14.2g/dL; current 13.9g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
